## 🏭 What We Build

> We design and develop **end-to-end AI systems** for industrial and manufacturing environments —
> from raw sensor data all the way to deployed, production-ready solutions.

```
Sensor / Camera  →  AI Model  →  Backend + Dashboard  →  Real-World Alert
```

---

## 🚀 Projects

### ✅ Project 1 — Steel Surface Defect Detection
> AI-powered visual inspection for manufacturing lines

- 🧠 **Model:** MobileNetV2 + GradCAM Heatmap
- 📊 **Dataset:** NEU Steel Surface Defect (6 classes, 1,800 images)
- 🖥️ **Demo:** Streamlit web app
- 🎯 **Result:** Confidence 100% on test images

[![Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-steel--surface--defects--detection-181717?logo=github)](https://github.com/AutoSenseLab/steel-surface-defects-detection)

---

### 🚧 Project 2 — Time-to-Event Prediction *(Coming Soon)*
> Predict when a machine value will reach a critical threshold

- 🧠 **Model:** TCN / LSTM with sliding window
- 📊 **Use case:** Predictive maintenance, process control
- 🖥️ **Demo:** Interactive dashboard with real-time plot

---

### 🚧 Project 3 — Industrial IoT Dashboard *(Coming Soon)*
> Real-time monitoring: PLC → MQTT → Dashboard → LINE Alert

- ⚙️ **Stack:** Raspberry Pi + MQTT + Streamlit
- 🏭 **Use case:** Temperature / pressure monitoring for factories

---

## 🔧 Tech Stack

| Layer | Tools |
|---|---|
| **AI / ML** | TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, OpenCV |
| **Data** | Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib |
| **Backend** | FastAPI, Uvicorn, Streamlit |
| **IoT / Hardware** | Raspberry Pi, PLC (Mitsubishi), MQTT |
| **Edge AI** | Jetson Nano, Jetson Orin Nano |
| **Control Systems** | PID, MATLAB, Simulink |

---

## 💼 Services

- 🔍 **AI Vision Inspection** — Defect detection for production lines
- 📈 **Predictive Maintenance** — Time-series forecasting for machines
